psalm-104-1.prayer: Lord, my soul blesses You. You are very great, clothed with splendor, majesty, and glory beyond anything I can understand.

psalm-104-2.verse:
Covering Yourself with light as with a cloak,
  Stretching out heaven like a tent curtain.
psalm-104-2.prayer: Father, You cover Yourself with light and stretch out the heavens by Your power. Help me stand in awe of Your greatness.

psalm-104-3.prayer: Lord, You rule over creation with wisdom and authority. Help me trust that every part of my life is held by Your hand.

psalm-104-4.verse:
He makes the winds His messengers,
  Flaming fire His ministers.
psalm-104-4.prayer: Father, even the winds and flames serve Your purposes. Teach me to recognize Your power in all creation.

psalm-104-5.verse:
He established the earth upon its foundations,
  So that it will not totter forever and ever.
psalm-104-5.prayer: Lord, You established the earth on its foundations. Keep my faith steady and rooted in Your unchanging truth.

psalm-104-6.verse:
You covered it with the deep as with a garment;
  The waters were standing above the mountains.
psalm-104-6.prayer: Father, You covered the earth with the deep waters. Remind me that creation itself obeys Your command.

psalm-104-7.verse:
At Your rebuke they fled,
  At the sound of Your thunder they hurried away.
psalm-104-7.prayer: Lord, at Your rebuke the waters flee. Help me remember that no chaos is greater than Your voice.

psalm-104-8.verse:
The mountains rose; the valleys sank down
  To the place which You established for them.
psalm-104-8.prayer: Father, You shaped the mountains and valleys according to Your wisdom. Shape my life according to Your will.

psalm-104-9.verse:
You set a boundary that they may not pass over,
  So that they will not return to cover the earth.
psalm-104-9.prayer: Lord, You set boundaries for the waters. Help me trust the boundaries and order You establish in my life.

psalm-104-10.verse:
He sends forth springs in the valleys;
  They flow between the mountains;
psalm-104-10.prayer: Father, thank You for sending springs into the valleys. Refresh the dry places of my soul with Your living water.

psalm-104-11.verse:
They give drink to every beast of the field;
  The wild donkeys quench their thirst.
psalm-104-11.prayer: Lord, thank You for caring for every creature. Teach me to trust Your provision and compassion.

psalm-104-12.verse:
Beside them the birds of the heavens dwell;
  They lift up their voices among the branches.
psalm-104-12.prayer: Father, let the beauty of creation remind me to praise You with joy and gratitude.

psalm-104-13.verse:
He waters the mountains from His upper chambers;
  The earth is satisfied with the fruit of His works.
psalm-104-13.prayer: Lord, You water the mountains from Your dwelling place. Satisfy the earth and satisfy my heart with Your goodness.

psalm-104-14.verse:
He causes the grass to grow for the cattle,
  And vegetation for the labor of man,
  So that he may bring forth food from the earth,
psalm-104-14.prayer: Father, thank You for causing grass and plants to grow for provision. Help me see Your care in daily blessings.

psalm-104-15.verse:
And wine which makes man’s heart glad,
  So that he may make his face glisten with oil,
  And food which sustains man’s heart.
psalm-104-15.prayer: Lord, thank You for giving gifts that gladden, strengthen, and sustain life. Teach me to receive Your provision with gratitude.

psalm-104-16.verse:
The trees of the Lord drink their fill,
  The cedars of Lebanon which He planted,
psalm-104-16.prayer: Father, even the trees are satisfied by Your care. Let my life be deeply rooted and nourished by You.

psalm-104-17.verse:
Where the birds build their nests,
  And the stork, whose home is the fir trees.
psalm-104-17.prayer: Lord, You provide places of shelter and belonging. Help me find my true home and safety in Your presence.

psalm-104-18.verse:
The high mountains are for the wild goats;
  The cliffs are a refuge for the shephanim.
psalm-104-18.prayer: Father, You care for every mountain creature and every hidden place. Remind me that nothing is outside Your attention.

psalm-104-19.verse:
He made the moon for the seasons;
  The sun knows the place of its setting.
psalm-104-19.prayer: Lord, You made the moon for seasons and the sun to know its setting. Help me trust Your timing.

psalm-104-20.verse:
You appoint darkness and it becomes night,
  In which all the beasts of the forest prowl about.
psalm-104-20.prayer: Father, even the night has purpose in Your creation. Help me trust You in seasons that feel dark or hidden.

psalm-104-21.verse:
The young lions roar after their prey
  And seek their food from God.
psalm-104-21.prayer: Lord, You hear even the young lions seeking food. Thank You for hearing my needs and caring for me.

psalm-104-22.verse:
When the sun rises they withdraw
  And lie down in their dens.
psalm-104-22.prayer: Father, You order the rhythms of creation. Teach me to live with wisdom, rest, and trust in Your design.

psalm-104-23.verse:
Man goes forth to his work
  And to his labor until evening.
psalm-104-23.prayer: Lord, help me work faithfully in the day You give me and honor You with the labor of my hands.

psalm-104-24.prayer: Father, how many are Your works. In wisdom You made them all. Fill my heart with wonder at Your creation.

psalm-104-25.verse:
There is the sea, great and broad,
  In which are swarms without number,
  Animals both small and great.
psalm-104-25.prayer: Lord, the sea is vast and full of life You created. Help me marvel at Your creativity and power.

psalm-104-26.verse:
There the ships move along,
  And Leviathan, which You have formed to sport in it.
psalm-104-26.prayer: Father, even the creatures of the sea exist under Your rule. Remind me that all creation belongs to You.

psalm-104-27.verse:
They all wait for You
  To give them their food in due season.
psalm-104-27.prayer: Lord, all creatures look to You for food in due season. Help me look to You with trust and dependence.

psalm-104-28.verse:
You give to them, they gather it up;
  You open Your hand, they are satisfied with good.
psalm-104-28.prayer: Father, when You give, creation gathers. Teach me to receive from Your open hand with gratitude.

psalm-104-29.prayer: Lord, when Your face is hidden, creation is troubled. Keep me close to Your presence and sustain me by Your Spirit.

psalm-104-30.verse:
You send forth Your Spirit, they are created;
  And You renew the face of the ground.
psalm-104-30.prayer: Father, send Your Spirit and renew what feels weary, empty, or lifeless within me.

psalm-104-31.verse:
Let the glory of the Lord endure forever;
  Let the Lord be glad in His works;
psalm-104-31.prayer: Lord, may Your glory endure forever. May You rejoice in the works of Your hands, including the work You are doing in me.

psalm-104-32.verse:
He looks at the earth, and it trembles;
  He touches the mountains, and they smoke.
psalm-104-32.prayer: Father, the earth trembles at Your look and the mountains smoke at Your touch. Help me live with holy reverence.

psalm-104-33.verse:
I will sing to the Lord as long as I live;
  I will sing praise to my God while I have my being.
psalm-104-33.prayer: Lord, I will sing to You as long as I live. Let praise remain on my lips through every season.

psalm-104-34.verse:
Let my meditation be pleasing to Him;
  As for me, I shall be glad in the Lord.
psalm-104-34.prayer: Father, may my meditation be pleasing to You. Let my thoughts bring honor, worship, and joy to Your name.

psalm-104-35.verse:
Let sinners be consumed from the earth
  And let the wicked be no more.
  Bless the Lord, O my soul.
  Praise the Lord!
psalm-104-35.prayer: Lord, remove wickedness and cleanse what does not honor You. Let my soul bless You with sincerity and joy.

psalm-104-closing.prayer:
Lord, thank You for Your majesty, wisdom, creativity, and faithful care over all creation. Help me see Your hand in the heavens, the earth, the seasons, and every daily provision. Refresh my soul, renew me by Your Spirit, and teach me to live with gratitude, reverence, and praise. May my thoughts be pleasing to You, and may my soul bless Your holy name.

In Jesus’ name, Amen.
